rows.label: tev024001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ivory about the residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ivory if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Ivory about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Ivory what she intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Ivory about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0001
rows.name:
This area is the residential district,
where most of the support crew lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0002
rows.name:
The idea was to live in Earth-like comfort
no matter what planet we landed on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Its specific design and layout were modeled
after Beverly Hills. It actually kind of
captures that vibe, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0008
rows.name:
Do you know Sullivan, the botanist
at the integrated production plant
in the industrial district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0009
rows.name:
I heard she was looking for a
BLADE to help her with a project.
I wonder if she found anyone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sure she was looking for someone to bring her
lots of plants she could keep as preservation samples
and display samples and blah de blah blah blah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'll admit that I prefer flowers
to people, but even I'm stunned by
how much Sullivan loves plants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0020
rows.name:
A line of beautiful houses in a sea of green
grass... Normally, we'd be able to hear the
happy voices of children at play...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0021
rows.name:
But that will have to wait until we
recover the Lifepoint Core. So I'm
counting on you to get it, friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll keep doing my part by planting
flowers and trimming trees so
everything's ready for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0028
rows.name:
We human beings are like flowers—no
matter how often we get stomped
on, we always pop back up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0029
rows.name:
As for me, I suppose all I can do
now is work hard to keep all of the
district's gardens looking nice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0030
rows.name:
But when we reclaim the Central
Life, there's a different job
that I want to do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0031
rows.name:
I want to babysit for the kids! I used
to do that all the time back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Imagine helping to raise the first
generation of people ever born on Mira!
What job could possibly beat that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0040
rows.name:
I received some samples of Miran
flowers from Sullivan the botanist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0041
rows.name:
But two of the three samples weren't
flowers at all! They were indigens
disguising themselves as plants![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0042
rows.name:
I had to call the Companion
for help, and it ended up
being this whole big...thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0043
rows.name:
But when I told Sullivan, she was all, "Oh nooo,
my precious display sample and propaganda sample!"
Seriously, that was all she cared about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024001_MSG0044
rows.name:
It's like they don't even let
you be a scientist if you have
a single lick of common sense.[ST:wait ]
